headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Could Be 10% Undervalued After Its $5b Credit Move
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) has entered an escrow agreement tied to a planned fourth amended and restated credit agreement, which could provide a $5b unsecured revolving credit facility and an additional $1b accordion feature. See our latest analysis for Alexandria Real Estate Equities. The escrowed credit agreement news arrives after a mixed period for Alexandria Real Estate Equities, with short term momentum improving, including a 7 day share price return of 4.10%, while the 1...

headline: REITs With Great Upside Potential
summary: Most REITs remain undervalued, but it is fair to say that they are not quite as cheap as they used to be. Check out our two top picks here.
